clockwise_arc.prompt_template: Cinematic 11-second architectural interior video. Starting from a fixed center point, the camera trucks right and performs a sweeping 180-degree arc around the kitchen island. Maintain smooth parallax movement to emphasize the depth of the room. Focus sharply on the {stone_name} grain and surface reflections. 4k resolution, fluid gimbal-style movement, no flickering.

counter_clockwise_arc.prompt_template: Cinematic 11-second architectural interior video. Starting from a fixed center point, the camera trucks left and performs a sweeping 180-degree arc around the kitchen island. Maintain smooth parallax movement to emphasize the depth of the room. Focus sharply on the {stone_name} grain and surface reflections. 4k resolution, fluid gimbal-style movement, no flickering.
